title: phaius subtrilobus
intro: Phaius subtrilobus, also known as the orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phaius subtrilobus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Phaius subtrilobus include dried roots, which can be made into decoctions, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
